dialogue.speaker: Kael
dialogue.line: You're a hard man to find, Vex.
dialogue.visual_cue: Kael steps forward, his eyes fixed on Vex

dialogue.speaker: Vex
dialogue.line: And you're a hard program to crack, Kael.
dialogue.visual_cue: Vex smirks, his hand resting on the grip of his gun

dialogue.speaker: Kael
dialogue.line: I've been tracking you for weeks. You've been leaving a trail of digital breadcrumbs everywhere you go.
dialogue.visual_cue: Kael's eyes narrow, his gaze scanning the alleyway for any signs of backup

dialogue.speaker: Vex
dialogue.line: Maybe I wanted you to find me. Maybe I have a message for your corporate overlords.
dialogue.visual_cue: Vex takes a step forward, his gun now drawn and pointed at Kael

dialogue.speaker: Kael
dialogue.line: I'm not here to listen to your threats, Vex. I'm here to bring you in.
dialogue.visual_cue: Kael draws his own gun, the two enemies facing off in the center of the alleyway

dialogue.speaker: Vex
dialogue.line: You'll never take me alive, Kael. I've got insurance. If I go down, the whole city goes down with me.
dialogue.visual_cue: Vex's eyes flicker to the side, a small drone hovering just out of sight

dialogue.speaker: Kael
dialogue.line: I'm not buying it, Vex. You're just trying to stall for time.
dialogue.visual_cue: Kael takes a step forward, his gun trained on Vex's chest

dialogue.speaker: Vex
dialogue.line: We'll see about that. Omega protocol, engage.
dialogue.visual_cue: The drone swoops into view, a high-pitched whine filling the air as it charges towards Kael

dialogue.speaker: Kael
dialogue.visual_cue: Kael raises his gun, firing a shot that barely misses the drone as it zooms past his ear

dialogue.speaker: Vex
dialogue.line: You should have stayed out of this, Kael. Now you're just a liability.
dialogue.visual_cue: Vex turns to run, the drone providing cover as he sprints towards the end of the alleyway

dialogue.speaker: Kael
dialogue.line: I'll never let you get away, Vex! You're going down for this!
dialogue.visual_cue: Kael gives chase, his gun firing wildly as he pursues Vex through the winding alleys of the city

dialogue.speaker: Vex
dialogue.line: We'll see about that, detective. The city is mine now.
dialogue.visual_cue: Vex disappears into the crowd, the drone vanishing into the shadows as Kael is left standing alone, his gun still smoking
